mapper.select: SELECT id, column_id as columnId, article_id as articleId, section, read_type as readType, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM column_article WHERE column_id = #{columnId} ORDER BY section ASC

SELECT id, column_id as columnId, article_id as articleId, section, read_type as readType, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM column_article WHERE column_id = #{columnId} AND section = #{section} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, column_id as columnId, article_id as articleId, section, read_type as readType, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM column_article WHERE article_id = #{articleId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO column_article (column_id, article_id, section, read_type, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{columnId}, #{articleId}, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(section), 0) FROM column_article WHERE column_id = #{columnId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM column_article WHERE column_id = #{columnId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, column_id as columnId, article_id as articleId, section, read_type as readType, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM column_article WHERE column_id = #{columnId} AND article_id = #{articleId} LIMIT 1
